title: Freelance Private Early Interventionist/ Learning Support Educator (1-to-1)
description:
Job Description: Freelance Private Early Interventionist/ Learning Support Educator (1-to-1)


APPLY HERE: https://portal.specialminds.com.sg/?type=service_professional


Company Overview: We are Singapore’s first dedicated matching platform for children with learning or special needs. Our mission is to connect children with freelance professionals across five key areas: Tuition, Early Education, Early Intervention, Therapy & Counseling, and Enrichment Activities. We strive to create a supportive community that bridges students' needs with expert guidance, helping them grow and thrive academically and emotionally.


Position: Freelance Private Early Interventionist / Learning Support Educator (1-to-1)


Responsibilities:

  • Provide individualised early intervention and learning support to children with developmental delays, learning difficulties, or special needs.
  • Develop and implement customised intervention plans and activities tailored to each child’s unique learning profile and developmental goals.
  • Work closely with families, caregivers, and other professionals to monitor progress, adapt strategies, and ensure holistic support for the child.
  • Use evidence-based practices to address specific developmental areas such as communication, motor skills, social interaction, and cognitive development.
  • Offer guidance and training to parents and caregivers to support the child’s learning and development outside of sessions.
  • Keep detailed records of each child’s progress, adjusting the intervention approach as needed to meet evolving needs.
  • Stay updated on the latest trends and best practices in early intervention and special education.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Early Childhood Intervention, Special Education, Psychology, or related fields.
  • Certification in early intervention or special needs education is preferred (e.g., Diploma in Early Childhood Intervention – Special Needs, DAS certification, or equivalent).
  • Previous experience working with children with special needs or developmental delays in a one-to-one setting.
  • Strong understanding of early childhood development and intervention strategies.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a compassionate and patient approach to working with children and their families.
  • Ability to work independently and customize learning plans based on each child’s progress and needs.
  • A passion for helping children with special needs thrive and succeed.

Why Join Us?

  • Enjoy Higher Rates: Our rates are adjusted for inflation and aligned with the latest market standards, ensuring you are fairly compensated.
  • No More Sudden Cancellations: We collect deposits before the first session, so you don’t have to worry about last-minute cancellations.
  • No Wasted Trips: If a client doesn’t show up, you will still receive compensation for the first session.
  • One-Time Administration Fee: Any additional sessions or direct referrals won’t incur further administrative fees from Special Minds.
  • Boost Your Profile: Gain visibility through the free promotion of your profile on our social media platforms, helping you connect with more clients.
  • Meaningful Career: With the growing demand for special needs education (SEN) in Singapore, this is your opportunity to gain valuable experience and build a meaningful career helping students with unique needs.
  • Additional Income Opportunity: Take on assignments that fit your schedule and preferences to earn extra income in your free time, or choose full-time opportunities for more consistent earnings!

Compensation:

  • Part-Time Tutor: Up to $60/hr
  • Full-Time Tutor: Up to $90/hr
  • Early Childhood Educator: Up to $70/hr
  • MOE/Special Ed Tutor: Up to $140/hr
  • Enrichment Specialist (dance, art, swimming, etc.): Up to $120-150 per session
  • Therapist (speech, occupational, physiotherapy, etc.):Up to $200-220/hr
  • Psychologist: Up to $250/hr
  • Counsellor: Up to $150/hr

If you’re passionate about education and want to make a difference in the lives of students with learning or special needs, join us at Special Minds. Together, we can create a brighter future for every child.

APPLY HERE: https://portal.specialminds.com.sg/?type=service_professional

For more information, please visit us at: https://specialminds.com.sg/

If you have further queries, please email us at hello@specialminds.com.sg, or contact us at 8721 8722.
